ns0:entry.ns0:title: 0xNyk/council-of-high-intelligence
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/0xNyk/council-of-high-intelligence
Language: shell
18 AI personas deliberate your hardest decisions across multiple LLM providers. Aristotle, Feynman, Kahneman, Torvalds & more — structured multi-round deliberation with genuine model diversity. One command: /council

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Light-Heart-Labs/ODS
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Light-Heart-Labs/ODS
Language: shell
Turn your PC, Mac, or Linux box into an AI server. LLM inference, chat UI, voice, agents, workflows, RAG, and image generation.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WhatsApp/proxy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WhatsApp/proxy
Language: shell
This repository contains the WhatsApp proxy implementation for users to host their own proxy infrastructure to connect to WhatsApp for chat (VoIP is not currently supported)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Yurii0307/yurikey
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Yurii0307/yurikey
Language: shell
A systemless module to get strong integrity easily

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bioconda/bioconda-recipes
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bioconda/bioconda-recipes
Language: shell
Conda recipes for the bioconda channel.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: edoardottt/awesome-hacker-search-engines
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/edoardottt/awesome-hacker-search-engines
Language: shell
A curated list of awesome search engines useful during Penetration testing, Vulnerability assessments, Red/Blue Team operations, Bug Bounty and more

ns0:entry.ns0:title: llm-d/llm-d
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/llm-d/llm-d
Language: shell
Achieve state of the art inference performance with modern accelerators on Kubernetes

ns0:entry.ns0:title: marlonrichert/zsh-autocomplete
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/marlonrichert/zsh-autocomplete
Language: shell
🤖 Real-time type-ahead completion for Zsh. Asynchronous find-as-you-type autocompletion.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: msitarzewski/agency-agents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/msitarzewski/agency-agents
Language: shell
A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: obra/superpowers
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/obra/superpowers
Language: shell
An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tw93/Mole
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tw93/Mole
Language: shell
🐹 Clean, uninstall, analyze, optimize, and monitor your Mac from the terminal.
